PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Lynch, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court and Petitioner discuss what the court will expect from him if the court grants his petition and he is appointed Executor, specifically, but not limited to, the duties listed in the Duties and Liabilities that he signed and filed with the court. The court and Petitioner discuss the bond amount that the court is considering. After additional discussion, the court confirms that no one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Nov-28-2021 is admitted to probate. David B. Lynch is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $200,000. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on Filing of a Final Inventory and Appraisal is set for Sep-06-2022 at 9:00 am. Status on close of estate is set for May-09-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
